elevator_pitch: PackageBuddy is a sleek, lockable door-mounted delivery sack that secures your packages and food deliveries without custom installation or bulky porch lockers. It hangs on any front door, locks with a code or NFC tap, and keeps your deliveries safe until you are ready to grab them.
problem: Package theft is a growing crisis, with porch pirates stealing billions of dollars in deliveries every year. Existing solutions like porch lockers are expensive, bulky, and impossible for apartment dwellers. Meanwhile, food delivery forces you to hover by the door for hours waiting for the knock.
solution: PackageBuddy is a premium, insulated delivery bag that mounts to any door with a secure over-door hook. Delivery drivers open it with a simple code or NFC tap, drop in your package or food order, and zip it shut. You get a notification on your phone and retrieve it whenever you are ready, no interaction required.
target_market: Urban apartment renters, townhome owners, introverts who avoid door interactions, frequent online shoppers, and food delivery power users. Secondary market includes HOA-restricted homeowners who cannot install porch lockers.
revenue_model: Direct-to-consumer e-commerce with tiered product pricing: $49 basic bag with bring-your-own lock, $79 with integrated code lock, $99 with NFC smart lock and app notifications. Recurring revenue from insulated liner replacements and seasonal limited-edition designs. Potential B2B partnerships with apartment complexes and property management companies.
key_features: Universal door-mount design that fits any front door with zero installation
Smart NFC lock with app notifications when deliveries arrive
Insulated lining keeps food hot or cold for up to 2 hours
Low-profile, premium design available in multiple finishes
competitive_advantage: Unlike bulky porch lockers, PackageBuddy works for apartments, townhomes, and HOA-restricted homes. It is the only solution that handles both packages and food delivery. The over-door design requires zero installation, making it accessible to renters and homeowners alike.
market_size_estimate: The US package delivery market handles over 20 billion parcels annually. With 1.7 million packages stolen daily and 36% of Americans reporting theft, the addressable market for porch security products exceeds $4 billion. The food delivery market adds another $300B globally.
go_to_market: Launch on Kickstarter to validate demand and build a community of early adopters. Follow up with a Shopify DTC store, Instagram and TikTok ads targeting apartment dwellers and frequent online shoppers. Partner with apartment review sites and property management newsletters for organic reach.
risks: Consumer adoption requires behavior change from both buyers and delivery drivers
Potential for copycats from established brands like Ring or Amazon
Weight limits may frustrate customers expecting it to hold large or heavy packages
year_one_milestones: Raise $150K on Kickstarter and ship first 3,000 units within 6 months
Achieve $500K in DTC revenue and 10,000 units sold by end of year one
Secure pilot partnerships with 3 major apartment management companies
